name: Notch Pay
description: Notch Pay is a payment gateway enabling businesses to accept and send money via mobile money (MTN MoMo, Orange Money, M-Pesa, Wave, Airtel) across Cameroon, Côte d'Ivoire, Senegal, Kenya, Uganda and Ghana. Each market settles in its local currency (XAF in CM; XOF in CI/SN; KES, UGX, GHS).
example_prompt: Add Notch Pay checkout to accept MTN MoMo and Orange Money payments in Cameroon.
